test_not_tautological.reason: test_calculateToastDuration_null_handling actually runs the function with null/undefined and checks return values against expected numbers (4000, 3000). A stub always returning a default wouldn't pass all three checks (null→4000, undefined→4000, empty→3000) unless it actually implemented the minDuration logic correctly.
